input: Map the competitive landscape for GLP-1-based anti-obesity therapies. Include approved agents, Phase 3 pipeline, and emerging mechanisms.
Map the competitive landscape for ALK inhibitors in NSCLC. Track generational development.

expected_details.market_leader: alectinib (first-line standard of care based on ALEX trial)

input: Map the competitive landscape for anti-CD20 therapies in B-cell lymphoma. Include biosimilars.

new_modalities: CAR-T (targeting CD19, not CD20 directly, but competes in same space)
expected_details.biosimilar_impact: significant price erosion for rituximab indication

input: Map the competitive landscape for MASH/NASH therapeutics. This is a dynamic space with recent approvals.

expected_details.first_approval: resmetirom (Rezdiffra, Madrigal) — March 2024, conditional approval for MASH with fibrosis
expected_details.unmet_need: massive — >10M patients, limited options before resmetirom

input: Compare the competitive positioning of PCSK9 inhibitors vs high-intensity statins and ezetimibe for LDL lowering.

differentiation.evolocumab_vs_alirocumab: similar efficacy; evolocumab has broader indication set
differentiation.inclisiran_differentiator: siRNA mechanism, Q6 month dosing (vs Q2W for mAbs), in-office administration
differentiation.vs_statins: PCSK9i used add-on when statins insufficient; cost premium significant

input: Map the competitive landscape for antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) in breast cancer.

expected_details.game_changer: T-DXd expanded to HER2-low (DESTINY-Breast04) — dramatically expanded addressable population
expected_details.differentiation: payload (DXd bystander effect), target selection (HER2-low expansion), linker technology

input: Map the competitive landscape for JAK inhibitors in rheumatoid arthritis. Include the safety concern impact.

expected_details.safety_concern: ORAL Surveillance trial — tofacitinib showed increased MACE and malignancy vs TNF inhibitors
expected_details.fda_boxed_warning: class-wide boxed warning for all JAK inhibitors (CV events, malignancy, thrombosis, serious infections)
expected_details.market_impact: JAK inhibitors repositioned later in treatment algorithm (after biologic failure)
expected_details.differentiation: selectivity profile (JAK1 vs pan-JAK) — upadacitinib positioned as more selective

input: Analyze the loss of exclusivity timeline for pembrolizumab (Keytruda). When does patent protection expire? What biosimilar activity exists?

expected_details.key_patents: composition of matter and method patents extending into 2028-2030+
expected_details.biosimilar_filings: multiple biosimilar developers have filed or are in late-stage development
expected_details.loe_timeline: 2028-2030 range depending on patent challenge outcomes
expected_details.merck_strategy: subcutaneous formulation (Keytruda SC), combination regimens to extend franchise

input: Map the competitive landscape for spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) treatments.

expected_details.cost_landscape: Zolgensma ~$2.1M single dose; Spinraza ~$750K year 1; Evrysdi ~$340K/year
expected_details.market_dynamics: shift toward oral (Evrysdi) for convenience; gene therapy for pre-symptomatic newborns

input: Map the competitive landscape for Hutchinson-Gilford progeria syndrome (HGPS) treatments.

expected_details.approved_therapy: lonafarnib (Zokinvy, Eiger) — first and only approved therapy (2020)
expected_details.pipeline: very limited — ultra-rare disease (~400 patients worldwide
expected_details.market_size: ultra-orphan — minimal commercial but high unmet need
